headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Public Storage, Raises Price Target to $326
summary: UBS  analyst Michael Goldsmith   maintains Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $314 to $326.

raw.headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Public Storage, Raises Price Target to $326

headline: Barclays upgrades CubeSmart, cuts Public Storage on relative valuation
summary: Investing.com --- Barclays upgraded CubeSmart to Overweight from Equal Weight and downgraded Public Storage to Equal Weight from Overweight, saying relative valuations now favor CubeSmart after its weaker year-to-date performance, while maintaining its Overweight rating on Extra Space Storage.

headline: Barclays Downgrades Public Storage to Equal-Weight, Maintains Price Target to $349
summary: Barclays  analyst Brendan Lynch   downgrades Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) from Overweight to Equal-Weight and maintains the price target from $349 to $349.

headline: Public Storage Prices Public Offering of $900 Million of Senior Notes at an Effective Interest Rate of 4.855% to Fund the Acquisition of National Storage Affiliates Trust
summary: FRISCO, Texas, July 10, 2026--Public Storage (NYSE:PSA, the "Company") announced today that the Company’s subsidiary, Public Storage Operating Company ("PSOC"), has priced a public offering of $900 million aggregate principal amount of fixed-rate senior notes (the "Notes"). The Notes will be guaranteed by the Company.
